verifyEmailAddressTitle.message: Verify your email address on PREreview

verifyEmailAddressWithButton.message: Please verify your email address on PREreview:

verifyEmailAddressGoingTo.message: Please verify your email address on PREreview by going to {link}

beListedAsAuthor.message: Be listed as a PREreview author

thanksContributingReview.message: Thank you for contributing to a recent review of “{preprint}” published on {prereview}!

authorHasInvitedYou.message: {author} has invited you to appear as an author on the PREreview.

beListedGoingTo.message: You can be listed by going to:

chooseNotToBeListedGoingTo.message: You can also choose not to be listed by ignoring this email or going to:

chooseNotToBeListedLink.message: You can also choose not to be listed by <link>declining this invitation</link> or ignoring this email.

acknowledgeReviewRequestTitle.message: Review requested from the PREreview community
acknowledgeReviewRequestTitle.description: The title of the email sent to a user when they have requested a PREreview of their preprint.

thanksReviewRequest.message: Thank you for requesting a review from PREreview.
thanksReviewRequest.description: Text in the email titled “Review requested from the PREreview community”.

reviewRequestSharedWithCommunity.message: While we cannot guarantee a review, we’ve shared your request with our PREreview community on our {slackChannel} Slack channel.
reviewRequestSharedWithCommunity.description: Text in the email titled “Review requested from the PREreview community”.

reviewRequestSlackCommunity.message: You can join our Slack Community and add further details to your review request by signing up at {slackLink}.
reviewRequestSlackCommunity.description: Text in the email titled “Review requested from the PREreview community”.

haveAnyQuestions.message: If you have any questions, please let us know at {emailAddress}.

footerIntro.message: PREreview is a platform, resource center, and convener.
footerIntro.description: The first sentence of the email footer.

footerCommunity.message: We provide ways for feedback to preprints to be done openly, rapidly, constructively, and by a global community of peers.
footerCommunity.description: The second sentence of the email footer.

footerJoinHtml.message: Join us at <prereviewLink>prereview.org</prereviewLink> and <slackLink>sign up to our vibrant Slack community</slackLink>.
footerJoinHtml.description: The third sentence of the email footer for HTML emails.

footerJoinText.message: Join us at {prereviewLink} and sign up to our vibrant Slack community at {slackLink}.
footerJoinText.description: The third sentence of the email footer for plain-text emails.
